case_number: Criminal Bail Application No. S-452 of 2025

chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Criminal Bail Application No. S-452 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge Applicant: Through Mr. Atta Hussain Qadri, Advocate Imran @ Muhammad Panah son of Uris @ Khadim Jalbani The State: Through Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh along with SIP Abdul Hakeem of PS Rato Dero Date of Hearing: 29.09.2025 Date of Order: 29.09.2025 O R D E R Shamsuddin Abbasi, J:- Through this application, applicant Imran @ Muhammad Panah seeks post arrest bail in Crime No.103 of 2024 of P.S Ratodero for the offence under Section 114, 324, 148, 149 & 337-H(ii) PPC, after dismissal of his bail plea by the learned Addl. Sessions Judge, Ratodero vide order dated 30.06.2025. 2. It is alleged in the FIR that applicant along with co-accused armed with pistols came at the scene of offence and on the instigation of co- accused Abdul Latif @ Kiriro caused fire arm injury to injured Muhammad Achar, which hit him on his right leg at knee, thereafter all accused fled away from the scene of offence. 3. Learned counsel for the applicant submits that there is a counter version of the alleged incident as an FIR has been registered by one Sultan against the complainant party and the injured Muhammad Achar did not appear before the police to get a letter for his examination; that in absence of any medical record, case of the applicant requires further inquiry in terms of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Page 2 of 2 4. Notice was issued to the complainant. Today, I.O/SIP Abdul Hakeem of P.S Ratodero is present and submits that complainant of this case and injured Muhammad Achar are absconders in FIR No.105 of 2024 of P.S Ratodero for offence under Section 324, 114, 148 & 149 PPC, and their whereabouts are not known to them. 5.

Notice was issued to the complainant. Today, I.O/SIP Abdul Hakeem of P.S Ratodero is present and submits that complainant of this case and injured Muhammad Achar are absconders in FIR No.105 of 2024 of P.S Ratodero for offence under Section 324, 114, 148 & 149 PPC, and their whereabouts are not known to them. 5. Learned Deputy P.G, Sindh submits that in absence of any medical certificate, the case of applicant requires further inquiry. 6. Heard learned counsel for the applicant, learned Deputy P.G, Sindh, I.O of the case and perused the material available on record. 7. No doubt, specific allegation for causing fire arm injury has been attributed to the applicant, which hit on right leg at knee of injured Muhammad Achar. The record reflects that injured was never examined by the medical officer and in absence of any medical record, case of the applicant requires further inquiry in terms of Section 497 Cr.P.C. Accordingly, instant Criminal Bail Application is hereby allowed. Applicant Imran @ Muhammad Panah son of Uris @ Khadim Jalbani shall be released on bail subject to furnishing his solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- (Rupees One Hundred Thousands Only) and PR Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial Court. 8. The above observations are tentative in nature and would not prejudice the case of either side at the trial. JUDGE Zulfiqar
